items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where the group size changes after booking. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or behaviors related to this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the system supports such changes. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result leads to an inconclusive status.
